<script setup lang="ts">
import { Field, FieldLabel } from "@/ui/field"
import { Switch } from "@/ui/switch"
</script>

<template>
  <Field orientation="horizontal">
    <Switch id="switch-basic" />
    <FieldLabel html-for="switch-basic"> Airplane Mode </FieldLabel>
  </Field>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import SwitchBasic from "@/examples/switch/SwitchBasic.vue"
import SwitchDisabled from "@/examples/switch/SwitchDisabled.vue"
import SwitchSizes from "@/examples/switch/SwitchSizes.vue"
import SwitchWithDescription from "@/examples/switch/SwitchWithDescription.vue"

import { Example, ExampleWrapper } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <ExampleWrapper>
    <Example title="Basic">
      <SwitchBasic />
    </Example>
    <Example title="With Description">
      <SwitchWithDescription />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Disabled">
      <SwitchDisabled />
    </Example>
    <Example title="Sizes">
      <SwitchSizes />
    </Example>
  </ExampleWrapper>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Field,
  FieldContent,
  FieldDescription,
  FieldLabel,
  FieldTitle,
} from "@/ui/field"
import { Switch } from "@/ui/switch"
</script>

<template>
  <FieldLabel html-for="switch-focus-mode">
    <Field orientation="horizontal">
      <FieldContent>
        <FieldTitle>Share across devices</FieldTitle>
        <FieldDescription>
          Focus is shared across devices, and turns off when you leave the app.
        </FieldDescription>
      </FieldContent>
      <Switch id="switch-focus-mode" />
    </Field>
  </FieldLabel>
</template>
